data.message: chore(qufq3f): narrow _read_state retry scope and add timing assertion

command: mkdir -p .gitban/agents/executor/logs && LOG_FILE=".gitban/agents/executor/logs/TECHDEBT2-qufq3f-executor-1.jsonl" && TS=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || date +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") && echo '{"event":"init","timestamp":"'"$TS"'","role":"executor","sprint":"TECHDEBT2","card_id":"qufq3f","cycle":1}' > "$LOG_FILE" && echo '{"event":"read-card","timestamp":"'"$TS"'","data":{"card_id":"qufq3f"}}' >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo '{"event":"code-change","timestamp":"'"$TS"'","data":{"files":["peon.sh","tests/peon.bats"]}}' >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo '{"event":"commit","timestamp":"'"$TS"'","data":{"hash":"0957def","message":"chore(qufq3f): narrow _read_state retry scope and add timing assertion"}}' >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo '{"event":"summary","timestamp":"'"$TS"'","data":{"total_events":4,"status":"complete"}}' >> "$LOG_FILE" && git add .gitban/agents/executor/logs/ && git commit -m "chore: add executor log for qufq3f"
